issues.summary: Fix payment gateway timeout on checkout
issues.description: Users are hitting a 30-second timeout during card processing on the /checkout endpoint. Affects approximately 12% of transactions in peak hours. Root cause suspected to be missing connection pool tuning in the Stripe SDK wrapper.

issues.summary: Upgrade auth library to patch CVE-2026-1234
issues.description: Security advisory CVE-2026-1234 affects jwt-go v3.x. Must upgrade to v4.x. Coordinate with the mobile team since they depend on the same token format.
Current endpoint returns all tasks in one response. Large accounts hit memory limits. Implement cursor-based pagination.
